segments.title: Cloudflare KV write spikes during CI
segments.summary: Amy reports write spikes in Cloudflare KV during CI runs. Justin suggests queuing non-critical writes to smooth them out, but Peter advises against changes before the 30th to maintain stability.
decisions: Avoid changes to the KV write process before the 30th.
segments.retrieval_summary: Defer changes to cloudflare_kv write process until after the 30th to mitigate CI-related performance spikes and ensure stability.

segments.title: Staging deployment status and verbose logging
segments.summary: Justin reports a successful staging deployment and a paused production deployment pending a patch. Peter notices verbose logs on staging, and Justin confirms it's from hydration debugging and will reduce the log level to 'warn'.
actions: Justin: Reduce staging log level to 'warn'.
segments.retrieval_summary: Justin to reduce staging log level to 'warn' after successful deployment to fix verbose logging from hydration debugging.

segments.title: Brief office internet outage
segments.summary: Amy reports a brief internet outage at the office. Peter acknowledges the update.
segments.retrieval_summary: Amy reports a brief internet outage at the office; outage, comms.

segments.title: Pinning Node.js and Miniflare versions in CI
segments.summary: Justin pins the Node.js version in CI to 20.15. At Amy's request, he also pins the Miniflare version to resolve a local mismatch and documents the change in CONTRIBUTING.
decisions: Pin Node.js version in CI to 20.15.
segments.retrieval_summary: Pin node.js to 20.15 and miniflare versions in CI to resolve mismatches; document change in CONTRIBUTING; dependencies, version-pinning.

segments.title: KV TTL settings for transient AI prompts
segments.summary: Peter inquires about the TTL for AI prompts in KV storage. Justin confirms it has been set to 10 minutes.
decisions: Set KV TTL for transient AI prompts to 10 minutes.
segments.retrieval_summary: Set cloudflare_kv TTL for transient AI prompts to 10 minutes; configuration.
